entries.content: definite article ① (referring to person or thing mentioned or known) [指已提及或已知的人或事物]▸ the Queen 女王 ⑤ (preceding clause or phrase) the fuss that he made of her [用于短语或从句之前] 他对她的宠爱 ⑭ (in double comparatives) [两个比较级连用]▸ the more I learn, the less I understand 我越学越糊涂
entries.name: definite article
